title: aquilegia vulgaris proles mollis
intro: Aquilegia vulgaris proles mollis, also known as the common columbine, is a species of flowering plant in the buttercup family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs due to its expectorant and anti-inflammatory properties. The plant's health benefits include its ability to soothe and calm the nervous system, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of menopause. Herbal preparations of Aquilegia vulgaris proles mollis include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
